content.en:
It didn't take long for the top two powerhouses of the three hundred and sixty-five main divisions to come here, and those top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were also discussing with each other.

"Everyone is here, it's time for them to enter the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm, according to the agreement, no matter what treasures they get from the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm, as well as the casualties, after they come out, they are not allowed to do anything. "

"Naturally, this is the case, and it's not just one entry, everyone will not engage in a full-scale war for the resources of the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space. "

"It's time, stop talking nonsense, let them in!"

Rumble!!!!

One by one, the top Ancient Demon level powerhouses took out some treasures, which seemed to be treasures that broke through the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space.

After they joined forces, cracks appeared.

"Let's go inside!"

These top Ancient Demon level powerhouses sent Ye Tian and Amusa into the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm.

......

In an instant.

Ye Tian came to a location in the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian sensed it a little, but he couldn't perceive the size of this space-time ancient demon realm, it seemed to be endless, and it seemed to be very small, but he was now suppressed very much, and he couldn't exert much in terms of speed and strength.

However, he is so, and so are the other emperor powerhouses, but it is also very fair.

Immediately, he began to search for the resources of the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space.

This place can make the main department of Luo Mu pay so much attention, and even ask for the resources here, it can be seen that the resources here are extremely precious, enough to make the top Gu Demon-level powerhouses and even the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses unable to aspire.

Maybe there's a resource here that the ultimate ancient demon needs!

Soon.

Ye Tian discovered the resources, and the resources he found shocked him incomparably.

"Wanmu Ancient Golden Stone !!!"

Ye Tian saw a huge stone, standing on top of a mountain peak, only a little bit was exposed, but it could be perceived inside, its size was very large.

He had seen the value of the Wanmu Ancient Golden Stone at the Battle Point Exchange Office of the Luo Mother's Main Department, and if it was evaluated by the Battle Points exchanged by the Luo Mother's Main Department, the value of this Wanmu Ancient Golden Stone should be 30 million Battle Battle Points!

What an exaggerated value, I found out not long after I came in.

From this point of view, just get some resources here, which is based on 100 million points.

"The Wanmu Ancient Golden Stone is very helpful to the ancient demon-level powerhouse, and a special substance can be extracted from it to enhance and strengthen the ancient demon-level powerhouse's ancient demon body, and it can also be used to refine weapons. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In short, many ancient demon-level powerhouses want the Wanmu Ancient Golden Stone, and after taking it out, they won't worry about not having an ancient demon-level powerhouse to buy it.

Ye Tian was about to take away the Wanmu Ancient Golden Stone, but suddenly his face changed, and the armor of Aromu appeared on his body, and even the Ultimate Rule Realm expanded.

And in the next moment, a ray of light tore through this area, but it was blocked by Ye Tian.

Immediately after, a small space-time ancient demon spirit appeared.

The spirit of the ancient demons of this time and space is only one meter five tall, but its hands are like sharp blades, just now it slashed at Ye Tian with its arm, and broke out a terrifying blow, even if it is the top five powerhouses on the emperor list, in the face of this blow, I am afraid that I can't stop it, and if I don't die, I have to hit hard.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian was killed with this space-time ancient demon spirit, Ye Tian used the Dapeng technique, the top ultimate arcane art, but his speed was still weaker than this space-time ancient demon spirit.

This surprised him!

"You can't hide your strength!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Ten Thousand Laws Form Second Form!"

"The second form of the Arojin body!"

The second form of the two major form secret techniques were all cast, which made Ye Tian's strength skyrocket in an instant.

Then, Ye Tian easily beat this time-space ancient demon spirit.

Burst!

This space-time ancient demon spirit was stabbed by Ye Tian's Luo Mu's sword light, and his body was shattered, but he recovered in an instant.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian slashed the body of the Ancient Demon Spirit of Time and Space again and again, but he couldn't kill it.

This made Ye Tian see the hope of killing this space-time ancient demon spirit.

After a long time, the aura of this space-time ancient demon spirit was extremely weak, and it was grabbed by Ye Tian with one hand, and layers of ultimate particles turned into seals to temporarily seal this space-time ancient demon spirit.

Then, Ye Tian first took the Ten Thousand Eyes Ancient Golden Stone, and then came to study this space-time ancient demon spirit.

"There is a very special mark inside its body, which is composed of a combination of time ultimate particles and space ultimate particles, which is very complicated!"

Ye Tian found that this seemed to be just an imprint, but it was composed of endless combinations of space-time particles, with countless combinations, and they were changing every moment, and it was impossible to understand its mystery in a short period of time.

"I'll copy one body to study here, and the other copy body to find resources!"

Ye Tian decided.

Anyway, those ancient demon-level powerhouses can't see here, and he won't expose anything.

Soon.

One copy body was condensed, and then it was here to study this space-time ancient demon spirit, and the other copy body went to other places to find resources.

There are a lot of treasures here, and just a few resources will make his net worth skyrocket, such an opportunity can't be wasted casually, and more treasures must be found as soon as possible!

In the following days, Ye Tian discovered one amazing treasure after another, maybe there are not many resources here, but each one is extremely precious.

And he often encountered some space-time ancient demon spirits, but he didn't continue to kill them, snatched the treasures and left, getting rid of them.

After all, he can study a space-time ancient demon spirit, and it is no good to kill them (Qian Zhao).

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a strong man on the Emperor List from the other main department, and the other party should be the number one emperor list from the main department of Yanxi - Duofu!

Dover was also a very old Emperor List No. 1 powerhouse, and when he saw Ye Tian, he showed a very cruel smile.

He also recognized Ye Tian, a powerhouse from the second emperor list of the main department of Luo Mu, but he didn't know much about Ye Tian, he only knew that he was the second on the emperor list of Luo Mu Fortress.

If Amusha came here, he would naturally be very jealous, but he was only second on the emperor list, and he had only recently become second on the emperor list, and he didn't care about Ye Tianzhu at all.

I saw that he directly attacked Ye Tian and wanted to kill Ye Tian.

And at the first time, Ye Tian broke out with the two major form secret methods, as well as the armor of the Arrowmu, and then cast the ultimate rule realm, without the idea of hiding his strength at all.

He wants to kill this Emperor No. 1 Dover!.
